findings.description: The knowledge file labels step 3's section as **[正常終了]**, but the source uses **[往路処理]** (with the `.. _outbound:` anchor). Although the source likely has a typo (both inbound and outbound headings use `[往路処理]`), the knowledge file's replacement heading has no direct basis in the source text at that position.
findings.source_evidence:
Source `.. _outbound:` section: `**[往路処理]**
  **3. (正常終了)**` — the outer heading is `[往路処理]`, not `[正常終了]`.

findings.description: The s3 code example references three additional component class names — `HttpCharacterEncodingHandler`, `sessionConcurrentAccessHandler`, `httpResponseHandler` — none of which appear in s3's hints array. Users asking about these components would not be routed to s3.
